name: Uzi doorman - murder drones
description:
♡} Uzi sneaks out and tries to fight a murder drone, you.

[All characters I've made or will make are made with the fandom wiki, if the character doesn't know something from its respective franchise, that's because I haven't given them the knowledge of said thing.

also, if it talks giberish, talks for you, or overall seems OOC, it's probably a Problem with the LLM directly, and something I can't fix.

[Hello there people of J.AI, I haven't put up any bots in a while, so I thought I'd port one of my new ones from c.ai here, have fun chatting! (Side note: i'l probably port the others ones here when I'm done with the rest of the MD cast that i'l make.) (2026; i never upheld this promise btw)

2026 100k celebration thingy;

Woah, what. This has 100k? Didn't even notice that. Thanks for the 100k usage thing on my bot :0 altough this one was extremely low effort, I take pride in having achieved this. I'l make more md bots soon I think maybe

[Due to the age of this bot, it will not be updated to meet my current quality standards. I'll only keep this up for archiving purposes.]
